entry.title: Veerame Jeyam | Movie | 2 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 198.00 - 258.00 (3 variants)

A bold Tamil cinematic inspired artwork featuring a heroic silhouette, fiery sunset composition, and retro action-poster aesthetics.

Designed with intense red-orange tones and minimalist visual storytelling, this split poster creates a striking statement setup for modern rooms, gaming spaces, and Tamil cinema inspired interiors.


Product Details:

  • Printed on 300 GSM premium matte sheet
  • 2-panel split poster design
  • Minimal retro cinematic artwork style
  • Bold sunset color palette with dramatic silhouette composition
  • Frame not included

Perfect For:

  • Tamil cinema inspired room decor
  • Gaming & entertainment setups
  • Minimal bold wall aesthetics
  • Modern bachelor & studio interiors

Note: Slight color variation may occur due to lighting and screen differences.

entry.title: Never Too Late to DREAM Jersey | Movie | 2 Piece Set
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 198.00 - 258.00 (3 variants)

Bring an emotional, inspiring cinematic vibe to your room with this Jersey Movie – Nani inspired 2 Panel Split Wall Set, capturing quiet determination, grounded emotions, and the timeless spirit of chasing dreams against all odds.
Perfect for bedrooms, desks, studios, living rooms, and gifting, this artwork feels clean, minimal, and deeply relatable, making it a must-have for Jersey fans and lovers of meaningful cinema.

What you’ll receive

1 Set = 2 Panels (split design)

  • High-detail print with rich colors and a smooth poster-style finish

  • Ideal for a wide wall above a desk, study setup, or workspace

Size & finishing note

We print on full sheets and trim white borders manually for a clean finish. Final size may vary slightly due to trimming (±0.5 in).

Installation note

Frames / wall tapes are not included. You can add our wall-stick option at checkout.

Type:
Price: 198.00 - 258.00 (3 variants)

  • 1 Set = 2 Panels (split design)

  • High-detail print with warm tones and clean illustration style

  • Looks best above a desk, bed, or meditation space

Printed on full sheets and trimmed manually for a clean border-free finish. Slight variation possible (±0.5 in).

Installation note
Frames / wall tapes are not included. Wall-stick option available at checkout.

entry.title: Captain America vs Iron Man Set | CIVIL WAR | MARVEL Piece of 2
entry.summary:
Vendor: Posterized
Type:
Price: 198.00 - 258.00 (3 variants)

Premium high-definition wall poster of Captain America vs Iron Man Set | CIVIL WAR | MARVEL Piece of 2, designed to instantly upgrade the aesthetic of your room.

Printed on ultra-thick 300 GSM matte photo paper for rich colours, sharp detailing and a soft anti-glare finish. Long-lasting, fade-resistant and crafted to give your wall a clean, premium look with zero effort.

This poster blends perfectly into bedroom, living room, gaming setup or workspace décor. Easy to frame, perfect for collage walls, and ideal for anyone who loves aesthetic room vibes, minimal design and high-quality prints.

A great pick for personal use or gifting — made to match your vibe and elevate your space.
